summary: Forecasting ~16.8M passengers for the week of Feb 23 - Mar 1, 2026 based on 2025 comparable week (16.41M) plus ~2.5% YoY growth
content: Base: 2025 comparable week (Feb 24 - Mar 2) = 16,410,407. Three estimation methods converge: Monte Carlo (16.81M median), Presidents Day ratio method (16.94M), early-Feb ratio method (16.56M). Average ~16.77M. YoY growth in early 2026 runs 2.4-4.4%, while BCG forecasts 5.8% global growth. North America had only 1% growth in 2025 vs 2024.
